title: trifolium angulatum
intro: Trifolium angulatum, also known as Angled Clover, is a species of clover that belongs to the pea family and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Trifolium angulatum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and treat various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Trifolium angulatum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal medicine to make salves and creams for topical application.
